title: matelea molinarum
intro: Matelea molinarum, a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, is a type of tropical vine native to Hawaii. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Matelea molinarum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating various infections, such as wounds and fungal infections. Herbal preparations of Matelea molinarum can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to promote overall well-being and healing.
